patchouli.examplemod.examplemod.name: Example Mod Manual
patchouli.examplemod.examplemod.category: Learn the initial workflow for this mod.
patchouli.examplemod.examplemod.entry.fi:
This repository keeps Patchouli manuscript sources under `manuscripts/`.

Edit the YAML and Markdown there, then regenerate JSON into `docs/`.

Run `python -m uv run mod-manual validate` before building.

When the output looks correct, copy the generated JSON into the target MOD repository by hand.
